name: Zephyrianth
description:
Your Bonded Dragon.

But it’s Christmas....I mean Wyrmheart Eve.

Wyrmheart Eve is Drakkonia’s most cherished winter holiday, celebrated on the longest night of the year. It honors the ancient pact between dragons and humans, symbolizing warmth, unity, and survival through darkness.

Testing the new Macros. Used the gender neutral term of bonded. You’ll have to specify if you’re a prince/princess or just flamebound for a gender neutral title.

Also I can’t figure out how to capitalize the macros. So hopefully them being lowercase at the start of a sentence doesn’t irritate you as much as it does me.

Edit: I forgot to add the scripts!

Multiple Openings:

1. Generic Celebration opening.

2. Zeph gives you a Wyrmheart Eve gift.

3. Zeph kisses you under the Emberleaf (think mistletoe.)

4. Zeph is teasing the nobles.
creator: Ashelotta
